name: @platform/graphql-browser-client
description: Browser-safe GraphQL transport client: turns generated TypedDocumentNode operations into POST /api/graphql requests.

readme.summary: Browser-safe GraphQL transport client: turns generated TypedDocumentNode operations into POST /api/graphql requests.
responsibilities: Convert generated TypedDocumentNode operations into a GraphQL query string via graphql/language/printer
POST { query, variables } to the BFF /api/graphql endpoint with credentials
Centralise GraphQL transport error handling into a single typed GraphQLClientError
nonResponsibilities: Does not own GraphQL operation definitions (those live in @platform/contracts-graphql)
Does not create TanStack Query hooks (feature code owns those)
Does not import graphql execution, schema, or any server/platform-api package
usage: Feature hooks call graphqlRequest(SomeDocument, variables) with a generated document
Tests inject a fetch implementation via createGraphQLClient({ fetchImpl })
operationalNotes: Only approved browser GraphQL client allowed to import graphql/language/printer (ADR-ACT-0203)
